name: Rogue R2X Beam
comment: Rogue R2X Beam is the light cannon of the Rogue series, boasting an intense 134,000 lux at 15 meters from its 231 Watt Osram Sirius lamp. This fully-featured beam can be tighten down to 1 degree for extremely focused aerial effects, and comes with 14 fixed colors in a fully scrollable, variable speed color wheel, which also provides split-colors perfectly. Additionally, the unit features individually controllable and overlapping 8 and 5-facet prisms for an endless supply of creative and dynamic beam looks. Frost and beam flattening options ensure even light distribution and the unit is equipped with RDM and DMX protocols.

capabilities.comment: Fast Close  Slow Open (S > F) - Strobe Pulse Open
Slow Close  Fast Open (S > F) - Strobe Pulse Closed
Pulse Strobe S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
BO While Color Wheel Moving On - Blackout
BO While Color Wheel Moving Off - Blackout
BO While Gobo Wheel Moving On - Blackout
BO While Gobo Wheel Moving Off - Blackout
